title: korovinia microcarpa
intro: Korovinia microcarpa is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage family, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Korovinia microcarpa include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Korovinia microcarpa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
